pom.xml.general_idea: Update the primary Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17 semantics, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler will reject JDK 21-specific language features if the source level is set to 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler target property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The generated bytecode will be incompatible with JDK 21 runtime expectations or fail to use JDK 21 class file features if the target is 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled for JDK 21 due to class file version mismatches.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito core to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Mockito may fail to mock classes or run tests on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or class file version issues.

src/test/java/SmartHome/controller/AddSe.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) with Java 21 List.getFirst() for safer and more expressive list access.
